# References

## Academic & Institutional Sources

1. **ILO** (2020). *Cooperatives and the World of Work*. International Labour Organization, Geneva.

2. **World Bank** (2021). *The Global Findex Database 2021: Financial Inclusion, Digital Payments, and Resilience in the Age of COVID-19*. World Bank Group, Washington DC.

3. **GSMA** (2023). *State of the Industry Report on Mobile Money 2023*. GSMA, London.

4. **FSD Kenya** (2022). *FinAccess 2021 Household Survey*. Financial Sector Deepening Kenya, Nairobi.

5. **SASRA** (2023). *SACCO Supervision Annual Report 2022*. Sacco Societies Regulatory Authority, Nairobi.

## Policy & Legal Framework

| Document | Authority | Relevance |
|---|---|---|
| Co-operative Societies Act, Cap 490 | Government of Kenya | Legal basis for SACCOs |
| SACCO Societies Act No. 14 of 2008 | Government of Kenya | SACCO regulation |
| National Financial Inclusion Strategy 2022-2025 | National Treasury | Alignment framework |
| Kenya Vision 2030 | Government of Kenya | Development context |

## Further Reading
- WOCCU (2023). *World Council of Credit Unions Statistical Report*
- AFI (2022). *Digital Financial Services and Financial Inclusion*
- KNBS (2022). *Kenya Economic Survey 2022*
